name: Java Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) Pillars
description:
Understanding Java OOP Fundamentals

Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) is the core paradigm of Java, focusing on objects rather than functions. This visualization breaks down the four fundamental pillars that allow developers to create modular, scalable, and maintainable software.

  • Encapsulation: Protects data by hiding internal state and requiring all interaction through well-defined interfaces (Getters/Setters).
  • Inheritance: Enables code reuse by allowing a 'Child' class to inherit fields and methods from a 'Parent' class.
  • Polymorphism: Allows one interface to be used for a general class of actions, specifically through Method Overloading (compile-time) and Overriding (runtime).
  • Abstraction: Simplifies complex systems by modeling classes based on their essential characteristics, using Abstract Classes and Interfaces.
code:
graph TD
  Root[Java OOP Pillars] --> Enc[Encapsulation]
  Root --> Inh[Inheritance]
  Root --> Poly[Polymorphism]
  Root --> Abs[Abstraction]

  subgraph Encapsulation_Group [Encapsulation Details]
    Enc1[Private Fields]
    Enc2[Public Getters/Setters]
    Enc3[Data Hiding]
  end
  Enc --> Enc1
  Enc --> Enc2
  Enc --> Enc3

  subgraph Inheritance_Group [Inheritance Details]
    Inh1[Superclass / Parent]
    Inh2[Subclass / Child]
    Inh3[Code Reusability]
    Inh1 -- extends --> Inh2
  end
  Inh --> Inh1
  Inh --> Inh3

  subgraph Polymorphism_Group [Polymorphism Details]
    Poly1[Static: Overloading]
    Poly2[Dynamic: Overriding]
    Poly3[Interface Implementation]
  end
  Poly --> Poly1
  Poly --> Poly2
  Poly --> Poly3

  subgraph Abstraction_Group [Abstraction Details]
    Abs1[Abstract Classes]
    Abs2[Interfaces]
    Abs3[Implementation Hiding]
  end
  Abs --> Abs1
  Abs --> Abs2
  Abs --> Abs3

  style Encapsulation_Group fill:none,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Inheritance_Group fill:none,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Polymorphism_Group fill:none,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Abstraction_Group fill:none,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5

  classDef default fill:#ffffff,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px,color:#000;
  classDef pillar fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b,stroke-width:3px,color:#01579b,font-weight:bold;
  class Root,Enc,Inh,Poly,Abs pillar;
